title: Structure raw request exemption controls

sources.reason: Defines the P0 structured exemption requirement.
Current raw request exemption validation accepts a free-form scalar.
Current trust guard authorizes registered exemption strings.
Existing exemption behavior and fail-closed regression coverage.

riskAssessment.reason: Tightens a governance authorization boundary while preserving supported maintenance exemptions.

executionDecision.reason: The exemption schema and fail-closed rules are deterministic and bounded.

preReviewWarnings: Verify unknown, unsupported, high-risk, and missing-source exemptions fail closed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: rawRequestExemption is a structured enum/policy/trigger record, not free text.
Exemption applicability and approval evidence are validated; high-risk work cannot be exempted.
Unknown, unsupported, missing-source, and malformed exemptions fail closed.
Tests and English documentation cover supported and rejected exemption scenarios.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
rawUserRequest: 执行评审整改计划工单 4：将 rawRequestExemption 改为结构化、可审计且 fail-closed 的授权记录，继续循环执行直到全部工单完成。

declaredIntent.summary: Prevent free-text raw request exemption bypasses with bounded policy and trigger evidence.

intent.problem: rawRequestExemption currently accepts a scalar string, leaving a free-text bypass path around raw request evidence.
constraints: Preserve the four already registered maintenance categories only when structured evidence is complete.
Do not weaken fail-closed behavior or add high-risk exemptions.
Keep policy portable and free of personal paths or secrets.
intent.rationale: Make exemption authority explicit, reviewable, and bounded by policy and trigger evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy, guards, tests, and documentation changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
